testcase.name: ProductErrorValidation

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.cssSelector: .mb-3, but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":".mb-3"}.
